structure.description: Horizontal pill row directly under hero showing same-logical-entity instances across platforms (e.g. dbt model, Snowflake table, Looker view of the same 'orders'). Click switches detail focus while preserving conceptual identity.

rationale.hypothesis: When an abstract concept is materialized in multiple systems, users need to switch viewing-platform without losing 'which thing am I looking at'. Sibling pills make cross-platform identity navigable in one click.

evidence.description: Siblings pill row on dataset hero linking dbt + warehouse + BI manifestations

counterexample.description: If entity exists in only one system, sibling row is empty — pattern degrades to no-op

shouldMatch.reason: Same asset traded on multiple exchanges — sibling pills
